en: If you hate run-ons but love clarity, listen up. 3 tiny marks, huge chaos. Let's catch the culprits.
Crime 1. The comma splice. Two sentences shoved together with just a comma.
Crime 2. The missing serial comma. List confusion. Lawsuits. Crime 3. The rogue comma.
That breaks essential clauses. Fix. Read aloud. Use conjunctions. Split sentences.
Be the grammar police. Stop comma crime.
